rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND B SIMMONS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 20, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT AMERESCO, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to September 20, 2013. rulings.Case Title: PETER GRIMES et al VS. COUNTRY WIDE BANK, AS THE ORIGINAL LENDER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Pendency Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 20, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF PETER GRIMES and AGNES GRIMES' Motion For Pendency Of Action Continued to September 10, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than August 30, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA JEAN ALONZI et al VS. CHRISTOPHER J. COSTELLO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 20, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER COSTELLO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled in part and sustained in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the 1-9th causes of action. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges a contract and facts supporting equitable estoppel. Demurrer is overruled as to 10th and 11th causes of action. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges all elements and challenge truthfulness of such allegations are not proper on demurrer. Demurrer is overruled as to 12 and 13th causes of action. P sufficiently alleges relations with third parties, which were interfered with by D's actions. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action 14 and 15 to allege all necessary elements of these causes of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to 16th cause of action to be alleged as remedy or as quasi-contract. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MANGU D. PATEL DBA FRANCES HOTEL & K. MIRANDA VS. YOON SENG SAECHAO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 20, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANTs YOON SAECHAO and JENNIFER HAUN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Plaintiff is not entitled to presumption. Defendants shall file their answer no later than August 20, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)
